title: Rumtek Monastery
description: Explore one of Sikkim's most important Buddhist monasteries, known for its spiritual significance and stunning architecture.

title: Banjhakri Falls
description: A beautiful waterfall surrounded by landscaped gardens and local folklore-inspired sculptures.

title: MG Marg
description: Discover Gangtok's vibrant promenade lined with cafés, shops, and local culture.

title: Namgyal Institute of Tibetology
description: Home to rare manuscripts, artifacts, and one of the world's most important collections of Tibetan studies.

title: Tsomgo Lake
description: A breathtaking glacial lake surrounded by mountains and changing colors through the seasons.

title: Local Village Walks
description: Experience the slower rhythm of Sikkim through guided walks, local interactions, and scenic countryside trails.
